data.name: Once a Porn a Time 3
data.detailed_description:
The gates of the most sinful amusement park of the galaxy are about to open! 💗
Become the "Charming Prince" and corrupt the most naïve and innocent android princesses of the park – before the visitors arrive!

Approach them. Break them. Train them. Humiliate them. Make them. Beg!
Show Tinker what Corruption really means!

  • 👑 Trainer Gameplay – Train the most beautiful fairy tale princesses ever created! Choose carefully how to pervert them, and maybe you'll manage to get them all! (Maybe)

  • 💝 High-Quality NSFW Scenes – Fully hand-crafted animations, undressing, eroticism, AND PORN!! If you succeed, of course!

  • 📢 Real Voice Acting – High-quality voicing with plenty of different voice actresses and NSFW scenes with orgasms, recorded especially for each scene and every porn choice you make!

  • 💛 New Skill System – Use the three skills: PERSUASION, MAGIC, and CORRUPTION to train the park's princesses as you please! Mix them or specialize in one, or in all of them! The choice is yours!

  • ❤️ Romance & Multiple Endings – Your choices will matter! Unlock different endings, forge romances, and decide the fate of the most perverted park ever created!

  • 💎 New Card Game – A new card gameplay will allow you to progress through the park, you will be able to play cards against anyone and level up to unlock more skills and earn rewards!

  • 🏆 Achievements & Collectibles – Unlock hidden scenes, achievements, special events, and unique rewards!

    Here, I offer you the ultimate trainer experience – a sinful fairytale universe, fully hand-crafted, with polished writing, unique princesses, and all wrapped in a refined artistic direction, led by yours truly, Salty01.

    The fate of the park is in your hands, Prince Charming !
    Have Fun! ~~

data.short_description: The ultimate NSFW fairytale trainer game – Corrupt all the princesses! Use Persuasion, Magic, and Corruption to break them. Unlock animated porn scenes, voice acting, and multiple endings in the galaxy’s most sinful park!
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 1.8GHz Dual-Core CPU
  • 顯示卡: Integrated graphics

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 16.04.7 or later
  • 處理器: 2,0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
